demos.name: ModelShift
demos.tagline: Model retirement and migration diagnostic that surfaces affected workflows, fallback gaps, and rollback actions before a provider change breaks production.
demos.audience: Founders, product engineers, platform teams, AI ops leads, and consultants managing model migrations
demos.problem: Teams depend on model providers and versions that change or retire, but they do not have a lightweight way to map affected workflows, fallback readiness, and cutover actions.
validation: Isolated demo implemented and locally runnable
Deterministic migration brief and Markdown export verified
copy fallback and storage-disabled states are testable

demos.name: CopilotBurn
demos.tagline: GitHub Copilot usage-based billing forecast that exposes burn drivers, overage risk, and weekly cost controls.
demos.audience: Founders, engineering managers, DevOps leads, finance ops, and fractional CTOs
demos.problem: Teams using GitHub Copilot can lose spend visibility as usage-based billing, code review minutes, and agentic workflows push AI credit burn past the monthly cap.
validation: Isolated demo implemented and locally runnable
Deterministic spend forecast and Markdown export verified
copy fallback and storage-disabled states are testable

demos.name: AnswerRank
demos.tagline: AI answer visibility diagnostic for B2B brands, with competitor gaps and weekly content fixes.
demos.audience: Founder-led B2B SaaS teams, solo marketers, SEO/GEO consultants, and content agencies
demos.problem: Small B2B brands do not know whether AI search and assistant answers mention them, cite competitors, or miss their strongest proof.
validation: Isolated demo implemented and locally runnable
Deterministic brief generation and Markdown export verified
copy fallback and storage-disabled states are testable

demos.name: AgentGate
demos.tagline: ROI, permissions, approvals, and audit-ready launch brief for AI agents.
demos.audience: 20-500 人公司的创始人、运营负责人、RevOps、Customer Ops、Finance Ops
demos.problem: 团队想让 AI agent 执行 CRM、客服、财务等重复流程，但缺少 ROI、权限、审批和审计的上线前评估。
monetization: Free：基础 Agent Launch Brief 可复制和 Markdown 导出。
Pro：多 workflow 历史、模板库和顾问版导出。
Consultant / Service pack：白标报告、多客户 workspace 和 5-flow audit。
validation: 已实现本地可运行 MVP 并完成增量报告能力。
覆盖 Copy brief、Markdown export、升级提示和顾问版报告文案。
覆盖真实 agent use-case seed、低/中/高风险、权限矩阵、localStorage recovery。
